title: Slap and a moonwalk two bits
display_title: Slap and a moonwalk two bits
wikitext:
[]: Slap and a moonwalk--two bits!             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Mon Feb 20, 2006 9:55 am Who else wishes Rei did more slapping? I sure did. Whenever Asuka was mouthing of, I was like, "Slap her, Rei. Slap her!"

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Mon Feb 20, 2006 10:26 am Only if it was accompanied by a moonwalk straight after.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 20, 2006 12:21 pm jcmoorehead wrote: Only if it was accompanied by a moonwalk straight after.

[]: Re: Slap             Quote Post by Faußtin » Mon Feb 20, 2006 12:23 pm poetic_assassin wrote: Who else wishes Rei did more slapping? I sure did. Whenever Asuka was mouthing of, I was like, "Slap her, Rei. Slap her!"

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Mon Feb 20, 2006 1:05 pm Slapping's for wimps. I've always wanted to see Rei, Kaworu, and Keel beat the living crap out of Gendo, Ritusuko, and Kozo!

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Mon Feb 20, 2006 2:16 pm But nothing undignifies someone more than a good ol' bitch slap.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Mon Feb 20, 2006 2:33 pm poetic_assassin wrote: But nothing undignifies someone more than a bitch slap.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 20, 2006 4:38 pm jcmoorehead wrote: Followed by the swiftness of the moonwalk.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Feb 20, 2006 5:35 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Aww hell... does anyone know how to animate in Macromedia Flash?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Feb 20, 2006 6:21 pm Monkey is willing to jun--invest up to several hours of his or someone else's life and damn his soul to hell for all eternity, all for the sake of a few chuckles with the capacity of standing along side dancing fat man Rei. :cry: King among men.

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Tue Feb 21, 2006 1:32 pm Oh, man! A moonwalking Rei gif would be so awsome! Someone must do!

[]:             Quote Post by xiuxiu » Tue Feb 21, 2006 3:52 pm wow

[]:             Quote Post by K2Grey » Tue Feb 21, 2006 8:55 pm Uh-oh, time for a who would win Rei vs Asuka thread ;0 I say Asuka if it's Rei II, but Rei if it's Rei III.

[]:             Quote Post by BLACKANGEL32076 » Sat Jul 01, 2006 1:22 am Hell, I'll give ya 4 bits if ya do it twice!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Cogboy » Sat Jul 01, 2006 1:15 pm I guess i missed this back in february. I think i will have to give some serious consideration to this. So, whats the vote - gif or flash animation set to smooth criminal? Also if anyone can recommend any episodes for good side footage of Rei walking that would help.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sat Jul 01, 2006 1:46 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: jcmoorehead wrote: Followed by the swiftness of the moonwalk.

[]: Re: Slap and a moonwalk--two bits!             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Jul 05, 2006 2:56 pm poetic_assassin wrote: Who else wishes Rei did more slapping? I sure did. Whenever Asuka was mouthing of, I was like, "Slap her, Rei. Slap her!"

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Thu Jul 06, 2006 10:42 am Cogboy wrote: I guess i missed this back in february. I think i will have to give some serious consideration to this. So, whats the vote - gif or flash animation set to smooth criminal? Also if anyone can recommend any episodes for good side footage of Rei walking that would help.

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Thu Jul 06, 2006 11:03 am You're a genius!

[]:             Quote Post by Watericekiller » Thu Jul 23, 2015 12:18 pm It wouldn't really fit Rei's charcter to be so reactive all the time. Obviously Asuka can be arrogant, but it doesn't suit Rei to resort to violence, let alone even words. Though I can't lie, the slap scenes are to kill for. :3
